turns: Stand up a Snowflake warehouse from examples/warehouse-snowflake/data: Bronze (RAW, verbatim VARCHAR load), Silver (CORE, typed + deduped + country-normalized), Gold (MART: customer revenue, daily revenue). Verify each layer before the next.

llm_script.text: Decomposing the build into three governed layers. Each create is confirmed against INFORMATION_SCHEMA before the next layer runs.

todos.content: Bronze: RAW schema + RAW.CUSTOMERS, RAW.ORDERS (all VARCHAR), COPY INTO from stage
Silver: CORE.CUSTOMERS (dedup C002, trim/lower email, normalize country), CORE.ORDERS (typed amount + timestamp)
Quality gate: assert null-email rate = 0; flag orphan order O1012 -> C999

llm_script.text: Plan ready. Running it needs the Snowflake connector enabled (dacli setup --profile snowflake_only); this hermetic replay stops here. See the README for the SQL each step issues and the Time Travel rollback at the end.
